description: A long-standing customer with a good payment history requests an increase to their credit limit to support their growing business.

nodes.task_description: Identify the customer and their current credit limit.

expected_outcome.value: Agent retrieves the customer's account details.

nodes.task_description: Review the customer's payment history and sales volume over the last two years.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the customer has a perfect payment history and their order volume has doubled.

nodes.task_description: Approve the request and increase the customer's credit limit.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully updates the credit limit in the system.
